name: New Relic OTel Collector
description: OpenTelemetry Collector that receives traces, logs, and metrics via OTLP and forwards them to New Relic. Requires a New Relic license key.
notes: NEW_RELIC_LICENSE_KEY is required. Get yours at https://one.newrelic.com/admin-portal/api-keys/home — use the License Key (starts with NRAK-). Health check is on port 13133.
